phrases.text_local: Desculpe, onde posso pagar a conta?
phrases.pronunciation: des-KOOL-pee, ON-dee POS-soh pah-GAR ah KON-tah?

likely_response.local: O caixa fica perto da saída.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW KEYE-shuh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: The cashier is near the exit.

responses.english: The cashier is near the exit.
responses.phonetic: AW KEYE-shuh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
responses.french: O caixa fica perto da saída.
